rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving undefined identifiers or invalid helper declarations in the same annex scope
Ensure type consistency between assumed types and actual expression types in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Only reference visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same AGREE annex scope
Avoid generating package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the model
Do not introduce unsafe Boolean-to-integer conversions in AGREE contracts
Remove invalid or unsafe clauses when AADL data types do not support the required operations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in valid component type scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be in component implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics unless the requirement explicitly demands it
Do not attempt to convert Boolean or opaque data types into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations not pointing to anything
